title: mallotus angulatus
intro: Mallotus angulatus, also known as the Chinese thunder of God tree, is a plant species native to Southeast Asia that belongs to the family Euphorbiaceae. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antitumor, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating infections, among others. Mallotus angulatus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
